synthesis.summary: MeridianBet couldn't add sports bonuses in a Peru onboarding flow. Matteo matched it to a prior incident and got an existing FE fix deployed, asking the partner to retest - but the partner reported the fix still failed, and a second user reported a related failure on a different action. Hours later, Hikmet found a genuinely different root cause (a hidden required AuthType field with no default) and fixed it directly, but nobody told the partner this second fix landed, nobody verified it resolves what the partner reported, and the second bug report was never tracked. The bot is now nudging to auto-resolve.
key_events: 14:43 UTC first FE fix deployed, partner asked to retest
14:51 UTC partner reports hard refresh still fails; separately a second user reports failure on a related action
15:49 UTC Matteo tells partner FE still investigating, will escalate tomorrow AM if not fixed by EOD
19:34 UTC Hikmet finds the real root cause (AuthType field required+hidden, no default) and removes the required flag, confirms he can save - never logged to incident.io or told to partner

synthesis.suggested_action: Verify Joachim's partner message went out and both reported failures are confirmed fixed; post the real root cause to incident.io before closing; ticket Matteo's verbose-validation-errors suggestion as a follow-up (A2).
